# PostClaw

> PostClaw is an AI social media manager that learns your brand, plans your content, and publishes to 9 platforms — all from a single chat conversation.

## What PostClaw Does

PostClaw is your AI social media manager. Chat with it to draft posts, plan your content calendar, adapt content for different platforms, schedule, and publish — all from one conversation. It learns your brand voice over time, analyzes performance, and suggests improvements. Your data and social accounts are completely isolated and private.

## Key Features

- AI social media manager via web chat that creates and publishes content
- Publish to 9 social platforms from one chat (Instagram, TikTok, X/Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, YouTube, Pinterest, Threads, Bluesky)
- AI-adapted content per platform (tone, length, hashtags, format)
- Content calendar planning and scheduling
- Performance analytics and best time to post recommendations
- Image generation for posts
- Media support (images and videos via Cloudinary)
- Brand voice learning — gets better the more you use it
- Unlimited posts, cancel anytime

## How It Works

1. Sign up and connect your social media accounts (free)
2. Try your first chat message for free
3. Choose a plan (from $17/month) for unlimited access
4. Chat with your AI social media manager — it writes, adapts, schedules, and publishes across all your platforms

## Target Audience

- Solo founders and indie hackers managing their own social presence
- Small teams and startups (1-5 people) without a dedicated social media hire
- Content creators who publish across multiple platforms
- Professionals who want to stay active on social media without the overhead

## Pricing

- Starter: $17/month — 2 social accounts
- Pro: $37/month — 6 social accounts, 3-day free trial
- Business: $79/month — all 9 social accounts, 3-day free trial, priority support
- Annual billing available (30% off)
- Unlimited posts on all plans
- 7-day money-back guarantee
- Cancel anytime, no contracts

## Tech Stack

- AI: Proprietary AI engine
- Social Media API: Zernio (zernio.com)
- Hosting: Vercel (Next.js)

- [Homepage](https://www.postclaw.io): Main landing page with product overview, demo, and pricing
